homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (very poor) to 7 (excellent).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 0
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This instrumental track blends smooth jazz and blues with a touch of funk, creating a mellow atmosphere perfect for unwinding. A groovy bass line and steady drumming rhythm drive the piece, which is supported by warm keyboard or Rhodes piano accompaniment. The slow tempo and relaxing vibe make it an ideal choice for background music in calm settings like lounges or spas.

CAPTION
This instrumental track blends a groovy bass line and steady drumming with prominent keyboard accompaniment to create a slow, easygoing atmosphere. The piece leans into jazz and funk influences, offering a relaxing sound perfect for unwinding in settings like a cozy lounge or coffee shop. With its calm and positive vibe, the music serves as an ideal background for setting a soothing mood.

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This instrumental rock track features a moderate tempo driven by electric guitars, bass, and acoustic drums. The piece opens with solos from the electric guitar and bass before transitioning into a solid rock rhythm that builds toward a final guitar conclusion. With an energetic and melodic feel, the recording captures the lively atmosphere typical of a live concert performance.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This segment serves as a lively and engaging example of traditional Spanish music, driven by an infectious rhythm that captures the essence of the genre. The sound is defined by the interplay of acoustic guitars and authentic percussive elements like castanets and a guiro, creating an energetic atmosphere perfect for dancing or storytelling.

questions.description:

The track features syncopated rhythms driven by diverse percussion instruments like mallets and synthesizers, resulting in a cheerful and lighthearted mood well-suited for video games or animated films.
